items.title: Technologies émergentes et cadres environnementaux, sociaux et de gouvernance
items.author: Canada School of PS / École de la FP du Canada
items.content:
<article>Cet enregistrement d'événement destiné aux auditeurs internes offre des perspectives pratiques sur l’intégration des facteurs ESG aux technologies émergentes qui ont le potentiel de transformer les pratiques d'audit interne.

https://catalogue.csps-efpc.gc.ca/product?catalog=TRN5-E47&cm_locale=fr</article>

items.title: Emerging Technologies and Environmental, Social and Governance Frameworks in Internal Auditing
items.author: Canada School of PS / École de la FP du Canada
items.content:
<article>This event recording for internal auditors offers practical insights on how to apply ESG factors to emerging technologies that have the potential to transform internal auditing practices.

https://catalogue.csps-efpc.gc.ca/product?catalog=TRN5-E47&cm_locale=en</article>

items.title: L’avenir du vieillissement de la population
items.author: Canada School of PS / École de la FP du Canada
items.content:
<article>Cet enregistrement d' événement orienté vers l’avenir met en vedette Zayna Khayat, Ph. D., futurologue spécialiste de la recherche en santé et coautrice du livre précurseur « The Future of Aging » (en anglais). 

https://catalogue.csps-efpc.gc.ca/product?catalog=WMT2-E18&cm_locale=fr</article>

items.title: The Future of Aging
items.author: Canada School of PS / École de la FP du Canada
items.content:
<article>This event recording features Dr. Zayna Khayat, a health futurist and co-author of the seminal book The Future of Aging, who shares her insights on how public policy-making bodies are adapting to meet the evolving needs of an aging population, whether by developing policies to improve the resilience of our healthcare systems, or by strengthening social support frameworks, or leveraging technology, among others.

https://catalogue.csps-efpc.gc.ca/product?catalog=WMT2-E18&cm_locale=en</article>
